category_sources: source_facts.description: Converts raw filesystems to VMDK files and vice versa.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vmdktool; FreeBSD ports man page and package metadata use vmdktool.
docs_sources: FreeBSD ports manual page is an official manpage for vmdktool and documents synopsis, description, examples, and history.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official source is distributed as a tarball at source_facts.source-archive, and no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states raw filesystem to VMDK conversion; FreeBSD ports man page describes VMDK conversion and command-line usage.
